note: Provenance sidecar — every non-derived field maps to its source_url and confidence. Derived fields (pct_mined, emission_remaining, daily_emission, annual_inflation_pct, fdmc, circulating_mcap, token_velocity) are computed by scripts/compute_derived.py and not listed here.

supply.max_supply.notes: Danube upgrade (2025-07-15) removed the original 1B cap; ALPH now has unlimited tail emission.

supply.current_supply.notes: Official Alephium mainnet backend, 2026-05-28; cross-checked with CoinGecko (221.61M).

emission.current_block_reward.notes: PoLW dynamic + 16 sharded chains make a single static block_reward value misleading; left null with notes.

emission.block_time_seconds.notes: Per-shard target; halved from 16s by Danube upgrade 2025-07-15.

emission.halving_schedule.notes: Continuous emission curve, not Bitcoin-style halvings. Two documented step-events: Danube (2025-07-15) and Year-4 stabilization (2025-11-08).

market_data.daily_volume.notes: CMC reports $169,722 (different exchange weighting). Thinly traded; primary venue MEXC.

tier_1.Sales.notes: Sold tokens (62,951,077), vesting language (2-4 yrs quarterly), 80M sales allocation total all from primary source.

tier_1.Sales.investors.notes: 80 contributors and $3.6M raised confirmed by official Sep 2021 announcement; 6 investors named via primary + later disclosures.

tier_2.Treasury_and_Team.notes: 30M tokens, 3yr quarterly vest, no cliff — directly quoted from official post.

tier_2.Ecosystem_Development.notes: 30M tokens, 4yr quarterly vest, no cliff — directly quoted from official post.

red_flags.warnings.notes: Each entry cited via tokenomics post + Sep 2021 announcement + Danube FAQ.

transparency_notes.notes: All 7 entries traceable to data_sources URLs (tokenomics post, Sep 2021 announcement, Cetacean Capital announcement, explorer, Tokenomist, Danube blog).
